## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Backend: [WebGPU / WASM]
- Image size/format: [optional]

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or browser console output.
